name: Create Custom Links in your Control Panel
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can add commonly used control panel pages (or even pages from the front end of your site) to a custom section in the left-hand menu of your control panel."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Add a Custom Link"}],"data-id":"1"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To add a custom link in your control panel:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In your Neto control panel, navigate to "},{"text":"Settings & Tools","bold":true},{"text":" » This will be the name that appears in the menu."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FC8LHXBLXLGV/customlinks3.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FC8LHXBLXLGV/customlinks3.png","name":"customlinks3.png","type":"image/png","size":287261,"width":2845,"height":1368,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FFC8LHXBLXLGV%2Fcustomlinks3.png","active":true,"mediaID":1782,"dateInserted":"2025-12-16T10:50:40+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Under Select URL for menu item, choose one of the following:
"},{"bold":true,"text":"
"},{"bold":true,"text":"Link to a URL","italic":true},{"text":" - to enter a web address for an external website. Paste the web address in the field below. This can be a web address of a page in your control panel.

","italic":true},{"text":"Link to an existing product","bold":true,"italic":true},{"text":" - link to product page. Enter the product's SKU in the field below. Click on ","italic":true},{"text":"Accept","bold":true,"italic":true},{"text":" to save the new menu link.

","italic":true},{"text":"Link to an existing stockist","bold":true,"italic":true},{"text":" - links to a stockist or store location. Select a store from the drop-down list below.

","italic":true},{"text":"Blog Post, Brand, Buying Guide, Form, Information Page, or Product Category","bold":true,"italic":true},{"text":" - links to a page with that content type. Select a page from the drop-down menu below.","italic":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4NHL8YGXR9WH/customlinks4.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4NHL8YGXR9WH/customlinks4.png","name":"customlinks4.png","type":"image/png","size":282982,"width":2845,"height":1349,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F4NHL8YGXR9WH%2Fcustomlinks4.png","active":true,"mediaID":1783,"dateInserted":"2025-12-16T10:55:13+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click on "},{"text":"Accept","bold":true},{"text":" to save the new menu link. Refresh your control panel to see the new custom links menu you have just created."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/QRYNMHFR1TLY/customlinks5.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/QRYNMHFR1TLY/customlinks5.png","name":"customlinks5.png","type":"image/png","size":282574,"width":2845,"height":1349,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FQRYNMHFR1TLY%2Fcustomlinks5.png","active":true,"mediaID":1789,"dateInserted":"2025-12-16T11:23:06+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Edit the Menu Layout"}],"data-id":"2"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To change the order of the menus, remove menus, and create submenus:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click and drag the menu option up or down to adjust its position. Release the mouse button when it's in the correct position. To create a sub-menu option, drag the option to the right so it is indented."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/50FBL3VX2RWB/customlinks6-281-29.gif","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/50FBL3VX2RWB/customlinks6-281-29.gif","name":"customlinks6(1).gif","type":"image/gif","size":467358,"width":1069,"height":525,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F50FBL3VX2RWB%2Fcustomlinks6-281-29.gif","active":true,"mediaID":1785,"dateInserted":"2025-12-16T11:14:14+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"To add a sub-menu option, click on the "},{"text":"+","bold":true},{"text":" icon.
